prompts: A large orange tabby cat with a torn left ear and bright amber eyes sits on a sun-warmed stone wall in a Mediterranean village, facing the camera. White-washed houses with blue doors line the cobblestone street behind. Warm afternoon light, medium shot.

A sun-warmed stone wall in a Mediterranean village, now empty. White-washed houses with blue doors, potted red geraniums, a lazy lizard on the wall, and villagers walking past in the distance. The cat is gone. Warm afternoon light, medium shot.

A large orange tabby cat with a torn left ear and bright amber eyes jumps back onto the sun-warmed stone wall from the right side, settling into a seated position facing the camera. White-washed houses with blue doors behind. Warm afternoon light, medium shot.
A vintage red double-decker bus crosses Tower Bridge in London on a rainy day, centered in the frame. Black taxis, pedestrians with umbrellas, and the Thames below. Grey overcast sky. Wide shot.

Tower Bridge in London on a rainy day with no red bus visible. Black taxis cross the bridge, pedestrians walk with umbrellas, the Thames flows below with a barge passing underneath. Grey overcast sky. Wide shot.

A vintage red double-decker bus reappears on Tower Bridge from the left side, crossing in the opposite direction on the rainy day. Black taxis, pedestrians with umbrellas, the Thames below. Grey overcast sky. Wide shot.

A bright yellow hot air balloon floats in a clear blue sky above rolling green hills dotted with sheep. The balloon is centered and prominent, with a wicker basket visible below. Soft morning light, wide shot.
A clear blue sky above rolling green hills dotted with sheep. No balloon visible, just wispy clouds, birds soaring, and the peaceful countryside below. Soft morning light, wide shot.

A bright yellow hot air balloon drifts back into view from the upper right of the frame, floating above the rolling green hills dotted with sheep. The wicker basket hangs below. Clear blue sky, soft morning light, wide shot.

A red cardinal bird perches on a snow-covered pine branch in a winter forest, facing the camera. Its bright red plumage contrasts with the white snow and dark green needles. Soft diffused winter light, close-up shot.

A snow-covered pine branch in a winter forest, now empty. Snowflakes drift gently down, other bare branches are visible in the background, and a light dusting of fresh snow settles on the needles. Soft diffused winter light, close-up shot.

A red cardinal bird lands back on the snow-covered pine branch, ruffling its bright red feathers and facing the camera. Snow-covered needles and the winter forest in the background. Soft diffused winter light, close-up shot.
A wooden sailboat with white sails and a dark blue hull glides across a calm turquoise bay, centered in frame. Rocky cliffs with green vegetation rise on both sides. Golden sunset light, wide shot.

A calm turquoise bay between rocky cliffs with green vegetation. The water surface is smooth with gentle ripples, a few seagulls skim the water, and the sunset paints the cliffs orange. No boat visible. Golden sunset light, wide shot.

A wooden sailboat with white sails and a dark blue hull sails back into the turquoise bay from behind the right cliff, gliding across the calm water toward the center of frame. Rocky cliffs with golden sunset light, wide shot.

A shiny red vintage sports car is parked on a cobblestone street in front of a Parisian café with green awnings. The car's chrome details gleam in the light. Passers-by walk on the sidewalk. Warm afternoon light, medium shot.

A cobblestone street in front of a Parisian café with green awnings. The parking spot in front is empty. Passers-by walk on the sidewalk, a waiter sets tables outside, and pigeons gather near breadcrumbs. Warm afternoon light, medium shot.

A shiny red vintage sports car pulls back into the parking spot on the cobblestone street in front of the Parisian café with green awnings. Chrome details gleam. Passers-by on the sidewalk. Warm afternoon light, medium shot.
